extract: Metagross (Japanese: メタグロス Metagross) is a dual-type Steel/Psychic Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves from Metang starting at level 45. It is the final form of Beldum. Metagross can Mega Evolve into Mega Metagross using the Metagrossite. Mega Metagross was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is referred to as a pseudo-legendary Pokémon by fans.
